betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Particle Physics: Decelerator§f

§aDecelerators slow particle beams down for capture and synthesis.§f
The §bDecelerator Controller§f (`qmd:decelerator_controller`) is the brain of a §bDecelerator§f multiblock. The Decelerator accepts a high-energy particle beam from one face and slows it down to capture-friendly energies, outputting the slowed beam on the opposite face. This is the §bdecay-trap§f of the QMD endgame — used to slow anti-particles to energies where they can be §bcaptured into §bAntimatter Cells§f.

§6Controller Crafting Recipe§f:
Per the §bminecraft.crafting§f grid, the Decelerator Controller is crafted from:
- §bElite Plating§f (`nuclearcraft:part:3`)
- §bExtreme Alloy Ingot§f (`nuclearcraft:alloy:10`)
- §bElite Processor§f (`qmd:semiconductor:6`)
- §bAccelerator Casing§f (`qmd:accelerator_casing`)

§6Decelerator Multiblock Structure (DeceleratorLogic.java)§f:
- §bShape§f: a hollow rectangular accelerator multiblock, similar in structure to a §bLINAC§f.
- §bBeam ports§f: one §bAccelerator Beam Port§f set to INPUT (incoming fast beam), and one set to OUTPUT (slowed beam).
- §bQuadrupole yokes§f: §bAccelerator Electromagnet Yokes§f on the inner ring.
- §bDecelerator RF Cavities§f: high-power RF cavities running §bnegative voltage§f to extract energy from the beam.
- §bPower & cooling§f: at least one §bAccelerator Energy Port§f and at least one §bAccelerator Cooler Vent§f.

§6Behavior in Operation (Equations.linacEnergyGain)§f:
- The decelerator uses §binverted RF cavity voltage§f to subtract energy from the beam: `ΔE = -|cavityVoltage| × |charge|`.
- Each pass reduces the beam's mean energy by a fixed amount (per `Equations.linacEnergyGain(cavityVoltage, stack)`).
- Focus is restored by the §bQuadrupole Yokes§f via `Equations.focusGain(quadrupoleStrength, stack)`.
- The chamber is balanced to keep the beam focused while losing energy — too much deceleration per pass can collapse the focus.

§6Component Supply Chain§f:
- §bElite Processor§f → requires §bAdvanced Processor§f + §bBSCCO Wire§f + Hafnium Oxide + §bPlatinum Ingot§f (QMDRecipes.java:505)
- §bExtreme Alloy Ingot§f → end-game alloy from §bHBM's NTM Alloy Furnace§f / §bNC Alloy Furnace§f
- §bElite Plating§f → end-game plating from §bNC Manufactory§f
- §bAccelerator Casing§f → from §bNC Manufactory§f

§cWarning§f: A Decelerator missing energy port, missing cooler vents, missing output beam port, or having incorrect RF cavity polarity will fail `isMachineWhole()` and refuse to form.

§eTip§f: To decelerate antiprotons into antimatter cells, route the §bDecelerator§f output directly into an §bAccelerator Ion Source§f loaded with an §bEmpty Cell§f — the antiprotons are captured into the cell, producing an §bAnti-Hydrogen Cell§f (`qmd:cell:1`).
